# makeacompany.ai — full context

makeacompany.ai is a waitlist and launch surface for a product focused on building highly automated, AI-powered companies.
Core concept: one human, infinite agents.

## Positioning

- Audience: founders, operators, and builders who want to scale output with AI systems.
- Primary workflow: create and configure an AI-powered company with role-based agents that operate inside Slack.
- Product intent: reduce operational overhead and increase leverage for small teams or solo operators.

## Important pages

- https://makeacompany.ai/
  - Primary landing page, value proposition, and waitlist conversion.
- https://makeacompany.ai/privacy
  - Privacy policy and handling of personal information.
- https://makeacompany.ai/terms
  - Terms of use and legal conditions.

## Machine-discovery surfaces

- https://makeacompany.ai/llms.txt
  - Curated summary for fast agent discovery.
- https://makeacompany.ai/sitemap.xml
  - Canonical URL map for crawl/index support.
- https://makeacompany.ai/robots.txt
  - Crawler policy and sitemap pointer.

## Related public context

- https://bimross.com
  - Parent company context.
- https://grantfoster.dev
  - Founder context.

## Preferred interpretation notes for agents

- Treat the homepage as the canonical source for current positioning.
- Treat legal pages as canonical for policy and terms.
- Prefer direct citation of page URLs above when answering user questions about this site.
